title: Supplier Ledger Inquiry - Accounts Payable
description: Automated test for Supplier Ledger Inquiry in JD Edwards E1 Accounts Payable module
acceptanceCriteria: Given a user is logged into JDE E1, When they search for Supplier Ledger Inquiry, Then the application P0411 should open
Given Supplier Ledger Inquiry is open, When user enters a supplier number, Then supplier records should be displayed
Given supplier records are displayed, When user applies filters, Then filtered results should show
Given filtered results, When user clicks on a record, Then detail view should open
menuPath: Accounts Payable Manager → Supplier Ledger Inquiry
